---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SBTM
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Case
<!-- Describe how this feature would be used in a real-world scenario -->

**Who would benefit:**
<!-- Example: Administrators, Drivers, Parents, IT Staff -->

**Frequency of use:**
<!-- Example: Daily, Weekly, Monthly -->

**Priority for your organization:**
<!-- Example: Critical, High, Medium, Low -->

## Examples
<!-- If this feature exists in other products, provide examples -->

## Mockups/Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to explain your feature -->

## Technical Considerations
<!-- Optional: Technical details if you have them -->

**Affected Components:**
<!-- Example: Admin Dashboard, Driver App, Backend API, etc. -->

**Potential Complexity:**
<!-- Example: Simple, Medium, Complex -->

**Backwards Compatibility:**
<!-- Will this break existing functionality? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here -->

## Willingness to Contribute
<!-- Are you willing to contribute to implementing this feature? -->
- [ ] I can help with design/specifications
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can help with code implementation
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
- [ ] I'm just requesting, not able to contribute

## Related Issues
<!-- Optional: Link to related feature requests or bugs -->
